meaning: n.优势,运星,运道,支配力adj.上升的,优越的
examples: But how will Washington shape regional rules when China has emerged as the ascendant power?
Northeastern and West Coast cities are ascendant, eclipsing former Sunbelt favorites such as Atlanta.
It was of a United States ascendant that Berlin wrote, a confident nation assuming responsibility for the world.
Whichever of Ituri's two tribes is briefly in the ascendant has taken revenge on the other.
The Manchester teams, with rosters stocked with some of the world's highest-paid players, appeared ascendant.
